phase1_baseline.note: Carry-forward from research/clean_session_analysis_2026-06-12.md. Signal_bridge data available for S3-S5 only (9 completed trades). S1-S2 (5 completed trades) lack signal_bridge data; dimension values estimated from post-session reports.

phase2_sessions.pnl_note: Three trades: AAPL LONG -12 actual (journal -14), PLTR SHORT +25 actual (journal +22), DIA ORB SHORT -20 actual (journal -22). All exit fills better than limit (marketable_limit mode). AAPL exit 0.64→0.66, PLTR exit 0.94→0.97, DIA exit 0.31→0.33. Journal-recorded P&L -14.00 corrected to -7.00 post-session. All DTE=0 (June 18 expiry day). All direct fills. All trailing_stop exits.
phase2_sessions.data_clean_reason: All 3 exit prices required post-session correction from broker-confirmed fills (marketable_limit mode fills at better-than-limit prices). Journal P&L -14.00 corrected to -7.00. DIA exit spread at 45% (bid=0.31, ask=0.49) vastly exceeded 10% threshold — exit proceeded with WARNING. No positions carried overnight; 0 broker positions/orders at EOD; 18 reconciler runs all clean (0 repaired, 0 flagged).

trades_detail.note: DIA exit spread 45% (bid=0.31, ask=0.49) far exceeded 10% threshold. Session runner issued WARNING and proceeded with exit. ORB strategy.

phase2_sessions.infra_notes: 356 cycles. 18 reconciler runs all clean (0 repaired, 0 flagged). 0 API errors. DIA exit spread warning: 45% > 10% max (bid=0.31, ask=0.49). Max entries per day (3/3) reached at ~12:29 ET — MSTR rejected on that basis, confirming rvol improved in afternoon session. PLTR exit spread warning not triggered (7.18% < 10%). AAPL exit spread warning at 10.37% (just over threshold).

phase2_sessions.pnl_note: Zero-trade session. Scanner operated all 360 cycles (09:30–12:30 ET) but rvol < 0.50 across all 27 symbols throughout. low_volume_chop gate blocked all 180 candidate rejections across 35 periodic re-scans. Peak rvol: AVGO 0.472 at ~10:42 ET, never cleared threshold.
phase2_sessions.data_clean_reason: Zero-trade session — no fills to verify, no broker state, clean pre-session checks, clean EOD shutdown. 360 cycles completed without incident.
phase2_sessions.infra_notes: Note: A prior S7 attempt on 2026-06-16 was invalidated due to sandbox VM reboot mid-session (process killed externally at cycle 24 ~09:58 ET, no positions open). That attempt was voided and excluded from evaluation. This 2026-06-17 run is the official Session 7.

phase2_sessions.pnl_note: All three trades resolved. XLE -$4 actual (journal recorded -$6, corrected). PLTR +$24. DIA +$15 (EOD limit expired unfilled 6/15; carried over, resolved via max_hold exit at S7 startup 6/16, broker-confirmed fill $1.95). DIA P&L attributed to S6 per Phase 2 carryover handling despite resolving during S7.
phase2_sessions.data_clean_reason: XLE exit price discrepancy (journal $0.36, actual $0.38, corrected post-session). DIA EOD exit order expired unfilled at broker close, requiring cross-session carryover resolution (resolved 6/16, all fills now confirmed and reconciled).

trades_detail.note: EOD sell limit 1.83 expired unfilled 6/15. Position carried to S7, re-linked via SessionRecovery fix, closed via max_hold rule (true entry time preserved) at S7 startup. Broker-confirmed fill 1.95, pnl=+15. Hold duration 79068s spans S6->S7 boundary.

cumulative.note: Includes Phase 1 baseline (S1-S5) plus Phase 2 S6, S7, and S8. S6: 3 trades (XLE -4, PLTR +24, DIA +15 carryover). S7: 0 trades. S8: 3 trades (AAPL -12, PLTR +25, DIA -20; all DTE=0, all direct fills).

dimensions.note: Through S8 (20 total trades: 14 P1 + 3 S6 + 0 S7 + 3 S8). S1-S2 signal_bridge unavailable; quality/age/scanner sourced from post-session reports where possible. S3-S8 have full signal_bridge data. All dimension counts reflect 15 trades with quality/DTE/age/scanner data (S3-S5=9 + S6=3 + S8=3; S1-S2=5 excluded from quality/age/scanner due to no signal_bridge).

quality_score.note: S3-S8 (signal_bridge data). 15 completed trades with quality data (9 P1 + 3 S6 + 3 S8: AAPL q=3, PLTR q=2, DIA q=3). 1 breakeven (SPY S3).

dte.note: S3-S8. 15 completed trades with DTE data. S6 all DTE=3 (June 18 expiry, Thursday due to Juneteenth holiday June 19). S8 all DTE=0 (June 18 actual expiry day).

asset_class.note: All 14 trades. ETF/single-stock classification from universe group. S1-S2 assumed ETF from symbol list.

signal_age_minutes.note: S3-S8 (15 completed trades with age data). S6: XLE 37.9min (30-60), PLTR 108.6min (90-120), DIA 73.9min (60-90). S8: AAPL 29.0min (<30), PLTR 24.6min (<30), DIA 90.4min (90-120).

scanner_score.note: S3-S8 (15 completed trades with scanner score data). S6: XLE 67 (60-69), PLTR 55 (50-59), DIA 58 (50-59). S8: AAPL 42 (40-49), PLTR 50 (50-59), DIA 48 (40-49).

minimum_observations.note: Minimum 3 per bucket before dimension comparisons. Updated after each session.

Q1_orb_vs_vwap.reason: ORB N=4 (2 wins/4, pnl=-102, PF=17/119=0.143). VWAP N=16 (3 wins/16, pnl=-146, PF=64/210=0.305). S8 adds DIA ORB loss (-20). ORB profit factor dropped from 0.174 to 0.143. VWAP improved slightly with PLTR win. Still indeterminate — both PFs below 1, VWAP higher PF but both unprofitable overall.

Q2_signal_age.reason: <30 N=4 (1 win/4, pnl=+13), 30-60 N=4 (0 wins/4, pnl=-97), 60-90 N=4 (2 wins/4, pnl=-87), 90-120 N=3 (1 win/3, pnl=-56). All four primary buckets now at N≥3. >120 N=0. <30 shows only positive pnl (+13) from S8 PLTR win outweighing AAPL loss. 30-60 remains weakest (0 wins). 60-90 best win rate but negative pnl. No consistent age→performance relationship established yet.
Q2_signal_age.note: 30-60 bucket now weakest. 60-90 and 90-120 both show wins but 90-120 still below N=3 minimum.

Q3_dte.reason: DTE=0 N=10 (2 wins/10, 20%, pnl=-117). DTE=2-3 N=4 (2 wins/4, pnl=-64). DTE=1 N=1. S8 adds 3 more DTE=0 trades. DTE=0 now largest bucket at N=10. DTE=0 win rate holding at 20% with strongly negative expectancy. DTE=2-3 shows 50% win rate over N=4 — early advantage for non-expiry DTE.

Q4_etf_vs_single_stock.reason: Single-stock N=4 (2 wins/4, 50%, pnl=-30, avg=-7.50/trade). ETF N=16 (3 wins/16, 18.75%, pnl=-218, avg=-13.63/trade). Single-stock now at N≥3 minimum. S8 adds AAPL (loss) and PLTR (win) to single-stock. Early pattern: single-stock win rate (50%) and avg_pnl (-7.50) both favor single-stock over ETF (18.75%, -13.63), but N=4 is still small. Potentially SUPPORTED pending more data.

Q5_quality_scores.reason: Quality=2 N=7 (2 wins/7, 29%, pnl=-96). Quality=3 N=5 (2 wins/5, 40%, pnl=-4). S8 adds PLTR (q=2, win +25) and AAPL+DIA (q=3, both losses). Quality=3 shifted from positive (+28) to near-zero (-4) after S8 losses. Quality=2 improved slightly. Early quality=3 outperformance pattern is weakening. Both buckets above N minimum. Still indeterminate.

Q6_scanner_score.reason: Score <40 N=3 (0 wins, pnl=-82). Score 40-49 N=4 (0 wins, pnl=-46). Score 50-59 N=7 (4 wins/7, 57%, pnl=-116). Score 60-69 N=1 (0 wins, pnl=-4). S8 adds AAPL+DIA (40-49, both losses) and PLTR (50-59, win). 40-49 bucket now confirmed weakest (0/4 wins). 50-59 improves to 57% win rate. Higher score bands appear better but still below N minimum for 60-69 and 70+. Still indeterminate — 50-59 showing positive win rate but negative overall pnl.

Q7_fill_path.reason: Recovered N=15 (2 wins/15, 13%, pnl=-280, avg=-18.67/trade). Direct N=5 (3 wins/5, 60%, pnl=+32, avg=+6.40/trade). Direct now at N≥3 minimum. S8 all 3 trades were direct fills. Direct 3/5 wins vs recovered 2/15 wins — stark difference. Direct pnl strongly positive (+32) vs recovered deeply negative (-280). Pattern potentially SUPPORTED but confound exists: S8 direct fills are DTE=0 with market in partial-day liquidity recovery, not a clean comparison yet.

note: Phase 2 tracking. S6: 3 trades (XLE -4, PLTR +24, DIA +15 carryover). S7: zero-trade standby (rvol < 0.50). S8: 3 trades (AAPL -12, PLTR +25, DIA -20; all DTE=0, all direct, all trailing_stop). data_clean=FALSE — all 3 exits required broker fill correction. 7 sessions remaining to Phase 2 completion (S15).
